title: SOURCE ERROR PRO AMAN VASISTH SIR TOPIC 4 VERB QUIZ BY

questions.question: I had thought (a)/ that somebody (b)/ may have dared (c)/ him to steal the car. (d)
questions.explanation: Main clause 'had thought' (past) mein hai, isliye 'may' ka past roop 'might' prayog kiya jayega.

questions.question: My (a)/ friend (b)/ and (c)/ my brother are here. (d)
questions.explanation: Dono nouns ke saath 'my' hai, matlab do alag log hain, isliye plural verb 'are' sahi hai.

questions.question: The mother asked me to lie the table for guests.
questions.explanation: Table sajane ke liye 'lay the table' ka prayog hota hai. 'Lie' letne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Fire (a)/ and (b)/ water (c)/ does not agree. (d)
questions.explanation: Do alag tatva hain, isliye plural verb 'do not agree' ka prayog hoga.

questions.question: The mother (a)/ asked me (b)/ to lie (c)/ the table for guests. (d)
questions.explanation: Table sajane ke liye 'lay' ka prayog hota hai (lay the table). 'Lie' letne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Neither of (a)/ the five (b)/ members (c)/ was present. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Neither' ka prayog sirf do ke liye hota hai. Paanch (five) ke liye 'None of' ka prayog karna chahiye.

questions.question: Most (a)/ of the (b)/ milk (c)/ were wasted. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Milk' uncountable hai, isliye iske saath singular verb 'was' aayegi.

questions.question: Many (a)/ a (b)/ flower (c)/ are born to blush unseen. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Many a' ke baad hamesha singular verb 'is' ka prayog kiya jata hai.

questions.question: I (a)/ was afraid (b)/ that if I asked her again (c)/ she may refuse. (d)
options: that if I asked her again
questions.explanation: Sentence past tense ('was', 'asked') mein hai, isliye sub-ordinate clause mein 'may' ka 'might' hoga.

questions.question: Neither of the films were worth watching.
questions.explanation: 'Neither of' ke saath hamesha singular verb 'was' lagti hai.

questions.question: The ship (a)/ drowned (b)/ in the middle (c)/ of the ocean. (d)
questions.explanation: Nirjeev vastu (jahaj) ke doobne ke liye 'sank' ka prayog hota hai, 'drowned' sajeev ke liye.

questions.question: You (a)/ ought (b)/ follow (c)/ the traffic rules. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Ought' ke baad hamesha 'to' (ought to) ka prayog hota hai. Bina 'to' ke 'ought' galat hai.

questions.question: He (a)/ behaves (b)/ as if (c)/ he was a millionaire. (d)
questions.explanation: 'As if' ke saath imaginary (kalpanik) sentence mein 'were' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: I (a)/ had (b)/ seen him (c)/ yesterday. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Yesterday' ke saath hamesha Simple Past (saw) ka prayog hota hai, Past Perfect (had seen) ka nahi.

questions.question: According (a)/ to the news (b)/ it can (c)/ rain tonight. (d)
questions.explanation: Sambhavna (Possibility) batane ke liye 'may' ka prayog hota hai. 'Can' kshamta (ability) dikhata hai.

questions.question: I (a)/ had (b)/ better (c)/ left the place. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Had better' ke baad hamesha V1 'leave' aana chahiye, V2/V3 'left' galat hai.

questions.question: Physics are his favorite subject.
questions.explanation: Subjects ke naam (Physics) singular hote hain, isliye 'is' aayega.

questions.question: Bread and (a)/ butter (b)/ are (c)/ a wholesome food. (d)
questions.explanation: Jab do nouns milkar ek unit (food) banayein, toh singular verb 'is' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: The (a)/ earth (b)/ moved (c)/ round the sun. (d)
questions.explanation: Universal Truth (शाश्वत सत्य) हमेशा Present Indefinite में होता है, इसलिए 'moves' आएगा।

questions.question: If I (a)/ was you (b)/ I would (c)/ never attend the party. (d)
questions.explanation: Hypothetical (kalpanik) sentences mein 'I' ke saath hamesha 'were' ka prayog hota hai, 'was' ka nahi.

questions.question: I must (a)/ complement you (b)/ on your (c)/ good manners. (d)
questions.explanation: Tareef ke liye 'compliment' (i wala) hota hai. 'Complement' (e wala) ka arth kisi ko poora karna hai.

questions.question: The criminal will certainly be hung because the charges are serious.
questions.explanation: Phansi dene ke liye 'hanged' ka prayog hota hai, 'hung' ka matlab kisi vastu ko latkana hota hai.

questions.question: Time and tide waits for no man.
questions.explanation: Is kahavat mein plural verb 'wait' ka prayog hi sahi mana jata hai.

questions.question: He (a)/ would (b)/ rather to (c)/ play than work. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Would rather' ke baad hamesha Bare Infinitive (V1 bina 'to' ke) ka prayog kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Slow (a)/ and (b)/ steady (c)/ win the race. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Slow and steady' ek hi vichar ko darshate hain, isliye singular verb 'wins' aayega.

questions.question: I (a)/ did not (b)/ saw (c)/ him yesterday. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Did' ke saath hamesha verb ki base form (V1) 'see' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: I did not saw him yesterday.
questions.explanation: 'Did' ke saath hamesha verb ki first form (V1) 'see' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: May I to come in, sir?
questions.explanation: Modals ke baad 'to' ka prayog nahi hota. Seedhe V1 aata hai.

questions.question: I (a)/ had (b)/ better (c)/ to leave now. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Had better' ek modal ki tarah hai, iske baad seedhe V1 'leave' aayega, 'to' nahi lagega.

questions.question: He behaves as if he was a millionaire.
questions.explanation: 'As if' ke saath imaginary condition mein 'were' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: I (a)/ would (b)/ rather (c)/ to die. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Would rather' ke baad hamesha V1 (die) ka prayog hota hai, 'to' nahi lagta.

questions.question: He (a)/ should (b)/ have (c)/ go there. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Should have' ke baad V3 'gone' ka prayog hota hai na ki V1 'go' ka.

questions.question: He (a)/ avoids (b)/ to (c)/ talk to me. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Avoid' के बाद हमेशा Gerund (V1+ing) आता है, इसलिए 'talking' होना चाहिए।

questions.question: He was (a)/ present in (b)/ the court (c)/ to give witness. (d)
questions.explanation: Gawahi ko 'evidence' ya 'testimony' kaha jata hai. 'Witness' gawahi dene wala vyakti hota hai.

questions.question: Slow (a)/ and steady (b)/ win (c)/ the race. (d)
questions.explanation: Ye ek kahavat hai jo ek unit ko dikhati hai, isliye singular verb 'wins' aayega.

questions.question: None of the work have been finished.
questions.explanation: 'Work' uncountable hai, isliye singular verb 'has' aayegi.

questions.question: Not only he but also his friends has come.
questions.explanation: Nearest subject 'friends' plural hai, isliye 'have' aayega.

questions.question: The scenery (a)/ of (b)/ Kashmir (c)/ are very beautiful. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Scenery' ek uncountable noun hai aur hamesha singular verb 'is' leta hai.

questions.question: If (a)/ he (b)/ comes (c)/ I shall go. (d)
questions.explanation: Conditional sentence mein 'If' clause present indefinite mein aur main clause future mein hota hai.

questions.question: He (a)/ did (b)/ nothing (c)/ but to laugh. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Did nothing but' ke baad Bare Infinitive 'laugh' aayega, 'to' ka prayog galat hai.

questions.question: My (a)/ scissors (b)/ is (c)/ very sharp. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Scissors', 'Pants', 'Spectacles' plural nouns hain aur plural verb 'are' lete hain.

questions.question: Nobody could (a)/ have forecasted (b)/ future (c)/ correctly. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Forecast' ki teeno forms (V1, V2, V3) 'forecast' hi rehti hain. 'Forecasted' jaisa koi shabd nahi hota.

questions.question: I saw him to cross the road.
questions.explanation: 'Saw' ke baad object + V1 (bare infinitive) 'cross' aata hai.

questions.question: The ship was drowned in the storm.
questions.explanation: Ship ke liye 'sank' aata hai. (Was sank passive form me error ho sakti hai, mostly 'sank' V2 behtar hai).

questions.question: He does (a)/ nothing but (b)/ to find faults (c)/ in others. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Does nothing but' ke baad Bare Infinitive (bina 'to' ke V1) 'find' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: Let us to play now.
questions.explanation: 'Let' ke baad bare infinitive 'play' aata hai.

questions.question: Taking tea, he went to the office and disposed of the work.
questions.explanation: Ek kaam poora karke doosra shuru karne ke liye Perfect Participle 'Having + V3' ka upyog hota hai.

questions.question: The river (a)/ has (b)/ overflown (c)/ its banks. (d)
questions.explanation: Nadi ke behne (overflow) ki V3 form 'overflowed' hoti hai, 'overflown' nahi.

questions.question: The traders suddenly rise the prices of crude oil last year.
questions.explanation: 'Last year' past ki baat hai, isliye 'raised' (badhana) ka prayog hoga. 'Rise' matlab swayam uthna.

questions.question: He (a)/ behaves (b)/ as if (c)/ he was the boss. (d)
questions.explanation: 'As if' ke baad imaginary condition mein hamesha 'were' ka prayog kiya jata hai.

questions.question: He (a)/ is (b)/ the (c)/ more intelligent of the two. (d)
questions.explanation: Jab do ke beech tulna ho aur 'of the two' laga ho, toh comparative degree se pehle 'the' lagta hai.

questions.question: Harish needs not come here as it is dark.
questions.explanation: Negative modal ke roop mein sirf 'need' ka prayog hota hai, 'needs' ka nahi.

questions.question: The wood was swimming in the river.
questions.explanation: Nirjeev vastuon ke tairne ke liye 'floating' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: It (a)/ may (b)/ rain (c)/ yesterday. (d)
questions.explanation: Past ki sambhavna ke liye 'may have rained' ya 'might have rained' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: The President (a)/ overtakes (b)/ in case (c)/ of emergency. (d)
questions.explanation: Niyantran lene ke liye 'takes over' ka prayog hota hai. 'Overtake' ka arth aage nikal jana hai.

questions.question: Gold (a)/ and silver (b)/ is (c)/ precious metals. (d)
questions.explanation: Do alag dhaatuyein 'and' se judi hain, isliye plural verb 'are' aayegi.

questions.question: The (a)/ quality of (b)/ the mangoes (c)/ were good. (d)
questions.explanation: Verb 'quality' (singular) ke anusar honi chahiye na ki 'mangoes' ke, isliye 'was' aayega.

questions.question: If I had money I will help you.
questions.explanation: Second conditional (If + V2) mein 'would + V1' lagta hai.

questions.question: He (a)/ told me (b)/ that he (c)/ is ill. (d)
questions.explanation: Reporting verb 'told' (Past) mein hai, isliye sub-ordinate clause mein 'is' ka 'was' ho jayega.

questions.question: He told me that he can help me.
questions.explanation: Reporting verb past (told) mein hai, isliye 'can' ka 'could' ho jayega.

questions.question: Five (a)/ years (b)/ are (c)/ a long time. (d)
questions.explanation: Samay ki avdhi (duration) jab ek unit ki tarah dikhayi jaye toh singular verb 'is' lagti hai.

questions.question: The (a)/ Arabian Nights (b)/ are (c)/ an interesting book. (d)
questions.explanation: Kitab ka naam hone ke karan ye singular hai, isliye 'is' ka prayog sahi hai.

questions.question: I (a)/ am (b)/ senior (c)/ than him. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Senior', 'Junior', 'Prior' ke saath 'than' ke badle 'to' ka prayog kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Each (a)/ boy (b)/ and each girl (c)/ were given a prize. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Each' ya 'Every' se jude huye nouns ke saath hamesha singular verb (was) lagta hai.

questions.question: He (a)/ should (b)/ have (c)/ told me. (d)
questions.explanation: Past ki kisi baat ke liye 'should have + V3' ka prayog bilkul sahi hai.

questions.question: I will send my servant but I cannot insure that he reaches.
questions.explanation: Nishchit karne ke liye 'ensure' aata hai. 'Insure' paise ya bima se sambandhit hota hai.

questions.question: It being a stormy night, you must thought of postponing the plan.
questions.explanation: Modal 'must' ke baad hamesha verb ki first form (V1) 'think' ka prayog kiya jata hai.

questions.question: The reporter (a)/ was unable (b)/ to illicit information (c)/ from the police. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Illicit' (avaidh) ek adjective hai. Jankari nikalwane ke liye verb 'elicit' ka prayog kiya jata hai.

questions.question: She has been working since two hours.
questions.explanation: Samay ki avdhi (duration) ke liye 'for' lagta hai. 'Since' point of time ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: When young, you ought to learn good habits.
questions.explanation: Past ki duty ke liye 'ought to have + V3' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: More (a)/ than one (b)/ person (c)/ were involved. (d)
questions.explanation: 'More than one' ke saath singular noun aur singular verb (was) lagti hai.

questions.question: He did nothing but to laugh.
questions.explanation: 'Did nothing but' ke baad bare infinitive 'laugh' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: He (a)/ made (b)/ me (c)/ to cry. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Make' (active voice) ke baad Bare Infinitive 'cry' ka prayog hota hai, 'to' nahi lagta.

questions.question: Ten (a)/ thousand rupees (b)/ are (c)/ a large amount. (d)
questions.explanation: Jab kisi rakam (amount) ko ek unit ki tarah dikhaya jaye, toh singular verb 'is' lagate hain.

questions.question: If (a)/ he (b)/ came to me (c)/ I will help him. (d)
questions.explanation: Second Conditional में 'If + V2' के साथ 'Would + V1' आता है। 'Will' का 'Would' होगा।

questions.question: If you (a)/ turn the corner, (b)/ you will (c)/ found a house. (d)
questions.explanation: Modal 'will' ke baad hamesha V1 'find' ka prayog hota hai, 'found' galat hai.

questions.question: I am used to drive in heavy traffic.
questions.explanation: 'Be + used to' aadat dikhane ke liye V1+ing (driving) leta hai.

questions.question: He has lain the book on the table.
questions.explanation: Rakhne ke liye 'lay' ki V3 'laid' hoti hai. 'Lain' letne (lie) ki form hai.

questions.question: The horse and carriage are at the door.
questions.explanation: Horse and carriage ek unit hai, isliye 'is' aayega.

questions.question: Each (a)/ student (b)/ was (c)/ given a book. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Each' ke saath singular noun aur singular verb ka prayog bilkul sahi hai.

questions.question: Scenes from the film had to be censured before release.
questions.explanation: Film ki kaat-chhaant ke liye 'censor' ka prayog hota hai. 'Censure' matlab kadi ninda karna.

questions.question: Either (a)/ the principal (b)/ or the (c)/ teachers is responsible. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Either...or' mein verb hamesha pass wale subject (teachers) ke according plural 'are' honi chahiye.

questions.question: The patient (a)/ died (b)/ before the (c)/ doctor arrived. (d)
questions.explanation: Do past actions mein pehle hone wale kaam ke liye Past Perfect 'had died' ka prayog kiya jata hai.

questions.question: I (a)/ cannot (b)/ be able to (c)/ solve this sum. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Can' aur 'able to' ka arth ek hi hai. Dono ka saath mein upyog 'superfluous' (faltu) hota hai.

questions.question: He would rather to die than beg.
questions.explanation: 'Would rather' ke baad bare infinitive (V1 bina 'to' ke) ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: The jury was divided in their opinion.
questions.explanation: Jab jury ke sadasyon mein matbhed ho, toh plural verb 'were' lagti hai.

questions.question: I use to play Hockey when I was young.
questions.explanation: Past habit ke liye hamesha 'used to' ka prayog kiya jata hai, 'use to' galat form hai.

questions.question: He (a)/ would (b)/ rather (c)/ to beg than steal. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Would rather' ke baad Bare Infinitive (bina 'to' ke verb) ka prayog kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Let him to do the work.
questions.explanation: 'Let' ke baad bare infinitive (bina 'to' ke) 'do' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: He (a)/ has (b)/ hanged (c)/ his coat on the peg. (d)
questions.explanation: Coat latkane ke liye 'hung' ka prayog hota hai. 'Hanged' sirf phansi dene ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: She (a)/ has (b)/ been (c)/ working since two hours. (d)
questions.explanation: Samay ki avdhi (duration) ke liye 'for' ka prayog hota hai, 'since' ka nahi.

questions.question: I had better to stay.
questions.explanation: 'Had better' ke baad V1 'stay' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: The wood (a)/ was (b)/ swimming (c)/ in the river. (d)
questions.explanation: Nirjeev vastuon ke liye 'floating' ka prayog hota hai, 'swimming' sirf sajeev (living) ke liye.

questions.question: The reporter was unable to illicit information from the police.
questions.explanation: 'Elicit' matlab jankari nikalwana. 'Illicit' ek adjective hai jiska arth 'avaidh' (illegal) hota hai.

questions.question: I (a)/ wish (b)/ I (c)/ was a bird. (d)
questions.explanation: काल्पनिक वाक्यों (Wish/If) में 'was' के स्थान पर 'were' का प्रयोग अनिवार्य है।

questions.question: The servant hanged the lamp on the wall.
questions.explanation: Vastu ko latkane ke liye 'hung' ka prayog hota hai. 'Hanged' sirf phansi ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Every morning (a)/ he might kiss (b)/ his beloved (c)/ and set off for work. (d)
questions.explanation: Past habit dikhane ke liye 'would' ya 'used to' ka prayog hota hai, 'might' ka nahi.

questions.question: Two (a)/ thirds of (b)/ the (c)/ apples was sweet. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Two thirds of' ke baad plural noun 'apples' hai, isliye plural verb 'were' aayegi.

questions.question: It being a stormy night, (a)/ you must (b)/ thought of (c)/ postponing the plan. (d)
questions.explanation: Modal 'must' ke baad hamesha verb की base form (V1) 'think' ka prayog hota hai, 'thought' (V2/V3) ka nahi.

questions.question: The quality of these apples are good.
questions.explanation: Subject 'Quality' singular hai, isliye verb 'is' aayegi.

questions.question: I (a)/ had (b)/ better (c)/ to go now. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Had better' ke baad Bare Infinitive (bina 'to' ke V1) 'go' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: The criminal (a)/ will certainly (b)/ be hung (c)/ because the charges are serious. (d)
questions.explanation: Phansi dene ke liye 'hang' ki V3 form 'hanged' hoti hai. 'Hung' ka prayog kisi vastu ko latkane ke liye kiya jata hai.

questions.question: A number (a)/ of people (b)/ was (c)/ present at the rally. (d)
questions.explanation: 'A number of' ka arth 'bahut se' hota hai, isliye iske saath plural verb 'were' ka prayog kiya jata hai.

questions.question: I was laying down when the bell rang.
questions.explanation: Letne ke liye 'lie' ki continuous form 'lying' hoti hai. 'Laying' matlab kuch rakhna.

questions.question: He (a)/ and I (b)/ am (c)/ good friends. (d)
questions.explanation: Jab do subjects 'and' se jude hon, toh plural verb 'are' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: He works hard so that he should please his Manager.
questions.explanation: 'So that' (purpose) ke saath 'may' ka prayog hota hai agar main clause present tense mein ho.

questions.question: No (a)/ man (b)/ and no woman (c)/ were there. (d)
questions.explanation: 'No' se jude huye singular nouns hamesha singular verb 'was' lete hain.

questions.question: Scenes (a)/ from the film (b)/ had to be censured (c)/ before release. (d)
questions.explanation: Film ki kaat-chhaant ke liye 'censor' ka prayog hota hai. 'Censure' ka arth ninda karna hota hai.

questions.question: Walking (a)/ in the field (b)/ late at night, (c)/ a snake bit me. (d)
questions.explanation: Dangling participle error. 'Walking' ka subject 'snake' nahi ho sakta. 'While I was walking' sahi hoga.

questions.question: The patient died before the doctor arrived.
questions.explanation: Do past actions mein pehle wala kaam 'had died' (Past Perfect) hoga.

questions.question: Every (a)/ student (b)/ and teacher (c)/ were present. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Every' se jude huye kitne bhi nouns hon, verb hamesha singular 'was' hoti hai.

questions.question: Gulliver's Travels (a)/ were (b)/ written (c)/ by Swift. (d)
questions.explanation: Kitab ka naam (Gulliver's Travels) singular hota hai, isliye 'was' aayega.

questions.question: Each of (a)/ the (b)/ boys (c)/ have their books. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Each of' ke saath verb 'has' aur pronoun 'his' singular hone chahiye.

questions.question: He (a)/ would rather (b)/ to die (c)/ than beg. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Would rather' ke baad 'to' ka prayog nahi hota, seedhe V1 (die) aata hai.

questions.question: Many (a)/ a student (b)/ have (c)/ failed in the test. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Many a' ke baad singular noun aur singular verb 'has' ka prayog kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Harish (a)/ needs not (b)/ come here (c)/ as it is dark. (d)
questions.explanation: Negative modal ke roop mein sirf 'need' ka prayog hota hai, 'needs' ka nahi.

questions.question: Two thirds of the apples was sweet.
questions.explanation: 'Apples' plural hai, isliye 'were' aayega.

questions.question: She (a)/ has (b)/ been (c)/ working for two hours. (d)
questions.explanation: Duration (do ghante) ke liye 'for' ka prayog bilkul sahi hai.

questions.question: The audience (a)/ still flock (b)/ to hear (c)/ him to sing. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Hear' ke baad direct object aur V1 (bare infinitive) 'sing' aata hai, 'to sing' galat hai.

questions.question: I (a)/ look forward (b)/ to (c)/ meet you. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Look forward to' के बाद Gerund (V1+ing) आता है, इसलिए 'meeting' सही होगा।

questions.question: When calamity fell the village, they faced it bravely.
questions.explanation: Museebat aane ke liye 'befell' verb ka prayog hota hai. 'Fell' ka matlab girna hota hai.

questions.question: I heard him to scream.
questions.explanation: 'Heard' ke baad object + V1 'scream' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: You (a)/ ought (b)/ to have (c)/ tell me earlier. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Ought to have' ke baad hamesha verb ki third form (V3) 'told' ka prayog hona chahiye.

questions.question: Every (a)/ man and woman (b)/ have the (c)/ right to vote. (d)
questions.explanation: Jab 'Every' ya 'Each' ka prayog ho, toh verb hamesha singular 'has' aani chahiye, chahe kitne bhi nouns jude hon.

questions.question: He (a)/ hope that (b)/ he would (c)/ fail the exam. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Hope' ka prayog acchi cheezon ke liye hota hai. Buri cheezon (fail hona) ke liye 'fears' ka prayog hona chahiye.

questions.question: Time and (a)/ tide (b)/ waits (c)/ for no man. (d)
questions.explanation: Purani kahavaton mein 'Time and tide wait (plural) for none' ko hi sahi mana jata hai.

questions.question: I have been knowing him for years.
questions.explanation: 'Know' continuous mein nahi aata, 'have known' sahi hai.

questions.question: Not only (a)/ the principal (b)/ but also (c)/ the teachers was present. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Not only...but also' mein verb nearest subject (teachers) ke anusar plural (were) hogi.

questions.question: Two (a)/ thirds of (b)/ the (c)/ book were read. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Two thirds of' ke baad singular noun 'book' hai, isliye verb singular 'was' hogi.

questions.question: Ten miles (a)/ are (b)/ a (c)/ long distance. (d)
questions.explanation: Jab ek nishchit doori (distance) ki baat ho, toh use unit maan kar singular verb 'is' lagate hain.

questions.question: He has hanged his coat on the peg.
questions.explanation: Vastu ko latkane ke liye 'hung' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: The (a)/ sum and substance (b)/ of the matter (c)/ are as follows. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Sum and substance' ek hi nichod (essence) ko darshate hain, isliye singular verb 'is' aayegi.

questions.question: The number (a)/ of students (b)/ participating (c)/ are increasing. (d)
questions.explanation: 'The number of' ek fixed quantity batata hai, isliye iske saath singular verb 'is' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: When young, (a)/ you (b)/ ought to learn (c)/ good habits. (d)
questions.explanation: Past ki duty ke liye 'ought to have learned' (V3) ka prayog hona chahiye tha.

questions.question: I (a)/ heard (b)/ him (c)/ to scream. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Heard' ke baad object + bare infinitive 'scream' aata hai, 'to scream' galat hai.

questions.question: He (a)/ has (b)/ lain (c)/ the book on the table. (d)
questions.explanation: Kitab rakhne (to put) ke liye 'Lay' ki V3 'laid' aayegi. 'Lain' toh 'Lie' (letna) ki V3 hai.

questions.question: Five (a)/ thousand rupees (b)/ are (c)/ a large sum. (d)
questions.explanation: Nishchit rashi (amount) ko ek unit maana jata hai, isliye singular verb 'is' aayegi.

questions.question: Let (a)/ us (b)/ to (c)/ play now. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Let' ke saath hamesha bina 'to' ke verb (play) ka prayog kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Many (a)/ a student (b)/ have (c)/ passed the exam. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Many a' ke baad singular noun aur singular verb (has) ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: My friend and brother are here.
questions.explanation: Ek hi vyakti ke liye 'my' laga hai, isliye 'is' aayega.

questions.question: Not (a)/ only the (b)/ principal but (c)/ also the teachers has come. (d)
questions.explanation: 'But also' ke baad wala subject 'teachers' plural hai, isliye 'have' aayega.

questions.question: I must complement you on your good manners.
questions.explanation: Tareef ke liye 'compliment' (i wala) hota hai. 'Complement' (e wala) ka arth 'purak' hota hai.

questions.question: You (a)/ had better (b)/ to (c)/ work hard. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Had better' के बाद Bare Infinitive आता है, 'to' का प्रयोग गलत है।

questions.question: Most of the rivers in Bihar have overflown their banks.
questions.explanation: Nadi ke behne ki V3 form 'overflowed' hoti hai. 'Overflown', 'overfly' (udna) ki form hai.

questions.question: The scenery of Kashmir are beautiful.
questions.explanation: 'Scenery' uncountable hai aur singular verb 'is' leta hai.

questions.question: Physics (a)/ are (b)/ a (c)/ difficult subject. (d)
questions.explanation: Vishayo ke naam (Physics, Maths) dikhne mein plural lagte hain par hote singular (is) hain.

questions.question: I (a)/ had (b)/ better (c)/ to stay. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Had better' ke baad Bare Infinitive 'stay' aayega, 'to' ka prayog galat hai.

questions.question: A lot of water have flown.
questions.explanation: Uncountable 'water' ke saath singular verb 'has' aayegi.

questions.question: I had seen him yesterday.
questions.explanation: 'Yesterday' ke saath hamesha Simple Past (saw) aata hai.

questions.question: Taking tea, (a)/ he went (b)/ to the office (c)/ and disposed of the work. (d)
questions.explanation: Ek kaam poora karke doosra shuru karne ke liye Perfect Participle 'Having taken tea' ka prayog behtar hai.

questions.question: Two and (a)/ two (b)/ makes (c)/ four. (d)
questions.explanation: Mathematical facts mein 'make' aur 'makes' dono sahi mane jate hain, par 'make' zyada behtar hai.

questions.question: Either the principal or the teachers is responsible.
questions.explanation: 'Either...or' mein verb nearest subject (teachers) ke anusar plural 'are' hogi.

questions.question: Neither of (a)/ the two (b)/ candidates (c)/ are fit for the job. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Neither of' ke baad plural noun lekin singular verb (is) ka prayog kiya jata hai.

questions.question: One (a)/ should (b)/ do (c)/ his duty. (d)
questions.explanation: Subject 'One' ke liye possessive case hamesha 'one's' hota hai, 'his' galat hai.

questions.question: One should do his duty.
questions.explanation: 'One' subject ke liye possessive 'one's' hota hai.

questions.question: I (a)/ wish (b)/ I (c)/ was a king. (d)
questions.explanation: Kalpana (wish) wale vakyo mein 'I' ke saath 'were' ka prayog hota hai, 'was' ka nahi.

questions.question: The audience still flock to hear him to sing.
questions.explanation: 'Hear' ke baad object + V1 (bare infinitive) 'sing' aata hai, 'to' ka prayog galat hai.

questions.question: When I (a)/ was young (b)/ I can (c)/ run faster than him. (d)
questions.explanation: Past ki ability dikhane ke liye 'can' ke badle 'could' ka prayog kiya jata hai.

questions.question: It is (a)/ absolutely no worry (b)/ even if the messenger (c)/ riches late. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Rich' ek adjective hai. Yahan 'pahunchne' ke liye verb 'reaches' ka prayog hona chahiye.

questions.question: When she entered (a)/ the room, she found (b)/ the child sleeping (c)/ and the fan move slowly. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Found' ke baad continuous action batane ke liye Present Participle (V1+ing) 'moving' ka prayog hona chahiye.

questions.question: I (a)/ am (b)/ used to (c)/ work hard. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Be (am) + used to' ke baad V1+ing (working) ka prayog aadat darshane ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: I had better to go now.
questions.explanation: 'Had better' ke baad bare infinitive (V1 bina 'to' ke) aata hai.

questions.question: Neither of the five members was present.
questions.explanation: Do se adhik ke liye 'Neither' ke badle 'None' lagta hai.

questions.question: When (a)/ calamity (b)/ fell (c)/ the village. (d)
questions.explanation: Museebat aane ke liye 'befell' verb ka prayog sahi hai, 'fell' (girna) galat hai.

questions.question: I keep my cool and never loose my temper.
questions.explanation: 'Loose' matlab dheela. Gussa khone ke liye 'lose' (L-O-S-E) ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: He (a)/ dared (b)/ not (c)/ to face the enemy. (d)
questions.explanation: Negative modal 'dared not' ke saath Bare Infinitive (face) ka upyog hoga, 'to' nahi lagega.

questions.question: You are (a)/ always (b)/ doing (c)/ this mistake. (d)
questions.explanation: Galtiyon ke liye 'make a mistake' ka prayog hota hai, 'do a mistake' galat collocation hai.

questions.question: Two thirds of the book were read.
questions.explanation: 'Book' singular hai, isliye 'was' aayega.

questions.question: Bhagat Singh (a)/ lie down (b)/ his life (c)/ for his motherland. (d)
questions.explanation: Balidaan dene ke liye 'lay down' ki past form 'laid down' ka prayog hona chahiye.

questions.question: Lalita has laid in the bed for two hours.
questions.explanation: Letne (lie) ki V3 form 'lain' hoti hai. 'Laid' rakhne (lay) ki form hai.

questions.question: He (a)/ gave me (b)/ many (c)/ advices. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Advice' uncountable noun hai, iska plural 'advices' nahi hota. 'Many pieces of advice' sahi hai.

questions.question: The (a)/ horse (b)/ and carriage (c)/ are at the door. (d)
questions.explanation: Ghora-gaadi (horse and carriage) ek unit hai, isliye singular verb 'is' ka prayog hoga.

questions.question: The ship (a)/ was (b)/ drowned (c)/ in the storm. (d)
questions.explanation: Jahaj (non-living) ke doobne ke liye 'sank' ka prayog hota hai, 'drowned' insaan ke liye.

questions.question: You ought to have tell me earlier.
questions.explanation: 'Ought to have' ke baad V3 'told' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: Many (a)/ people (b)/ were (c)/ killed in the accident. (d)
questions.explanation: Passive voice mein 'were + V3' (killed) ka prayog sahi hai. Isme koi error nahi hai.

questions.question: The (a)/ United States (b)/ have (c)/ a big navy. (d)
questions.explanation: Desh ka naam (United States) singular hota hai, isliye verb 'has' aayegi.

questions.question: I keep (a)/ my cool (b)/ and never (c)/ loose my temper. (d)
questions.explanation: Gussa khone ke liye 'lose' (L-O-S-E) ka prayog hota hai. 'Loose' ka arth dheela hota hai.

questions.question: I am used to work hard.
questions.explanation: 'Be (am) + used to' ke baad habit dikhane ke liye Gerund (V1+ing) lagta hai.

questions.question: I am senior than him.
questions.explanation: 'Senior' ke saath 'than' nahi 'to' lagta hai.

questions.question: He lay his luggage aside and lay down to rest.
questions.explanation: Saman rakhne ke liye 'lay' ki past form 'laid' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: The number of students are increasing.
questions.explanation: 'The number of' ek unit ko batata hai, isliye singular verb 'is' aayegi.

questions.question: You need not to worry.
questions.explanation: Modal 'need not' ke baad 'to' ka prayog nahi hota.

questions.question: He (a)/ made (b)/ me (c)/ to wash his car. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Make' जब Active Voice में हो, तो 'to' का प्रयोग नहीं होता। सिर्फ 'wash' आएगा।

questions.question: He should have told me.
questions.explanation: 'Should have + V3' (told) bilkul sahi structure hai.

questions.question: He returned the purse though he could keep it easily.
questions.explanation: Past ki capability jo poori nahi hui, uske liye 'could have + V3' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: May (a)/ I (b)/ to come (c)/ in, sir? (d)
questions.explanation: Modals ke baad seedhe V1 aata hai, 'to' ka prayog galat hai.

questions.question: Neither (a)/ of the (b)/ two paths (c)/ lead to the station. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Neither of' ke saath singular verb ka prayog hota hai, isliye 'leads' aayega.

questions.question: The (a)/ Prime Minister (b)/ and the President (c)/ has arrived. (d)
questions.explanation: Dono nouns ke saath 'The' laga hai, matlab do alag log hain, isliye plural verb 'have' aayegi.

questions.question: We would only wonder about in aimless pursuits.
questions.explanation: Bina uddeshya ghumne ke liye 'wander' ka prayog hota hai. 'Wonder' ka arth hairan hona hai.

questions.question: Each (a)/ of (b)/ the (c)/ drawers were searched. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Each of' ke baad plural noun hota hai par verb hamesha singular (was) hoti hai.

questions.question: The servant (a)/ hanged (b)/ the lamp (c)/ on the wall. (d)
questions.explanation: Vastu ko latkane ke liye 'hang' ki V2 form 'hung' hoti hai. 'Hanged' ka prayog sirf phansi dene ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: A number of people was present.
questions.explanation: 'A number of' ka matlab 'bahut se' hota hai, isliye plural verb 'were' aati hai.

questions.question: It (a)/ is (b)/ time (c)/ we go home. (d)
questions.explanation: 'It is time' ke baad wale clause mein verb ki second form 'went' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: He is one of the tallest boy in class.
questions.explanation: 'One of' ke baad noun hamesha plural (boys) hota hai.

questions.question: It is I who has done this.
questions.explanation: 'Who' ke pehle 'I' hai, isliye verb 'have' aayegi.

questions.question: Lalita (a)/ has laid (b)/ in the bed (c)/ for two hours. (d)
questions.explanation: Letne (lie) ki V3 form 'lain' hoti hai. 'Laid' yahan galat verb form hai.

questions.question: Most of the rivers (a)/ in Bihar (b)/ have overflown (c)/ their banks. (d)
questions.explanation: Nadi ke bahne (overflow) ki V3 form 'overflowed' hoti hai. 'Overflown' udne (overfly) ki V3 form hai jo yahan galat hai.

questions.question: Not (a)/ only he (b)/ but also his friends (c)/ was arrested. (d)
questions.explanation: 'But also' ke baad wala subject 'friends' plural hai, isliye verb 'were' honi chahiye.

questions.question: These poisonous gases will effect health.
questions.explanation: 'Effect' noun hai. Yahan verb ki zarurat hai, isliye 'affect' (prabhavit karna) sahi hai.

questions.question: I (a)/ will (b)/ accompany (c)/ you tonight. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Accompany' ke saath 'with' nahi lagta, aur 'will' ka prayog nishchit-ta dikhata hai.

questions.question: Gulliver's (a)/ Travels (b)/ are (c)/ an excellent book. (d)
questions.explanation: Kitab ka naam plural dikhne par bhi singular hota hai, isliye 'is' aayega.

questions.question: If I was you, I would not attend.
questions.explanation: Hypothetical sentences mein 'I' ke saath hamesha 'were' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: Not only (a)/ the doctor (b)/ but also (c)/ the nurses was helpful. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Not only...but also' mein verb nearest subject (nurses) ke anusar plural 'were' honi chahiye.

questions.question: Neither of (a)/ the two (b)/ candidates (c)/ were selected. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Neither of' ke baad plural noun aata hai par verb hamesha singular 'was' honi chahiye.

questions.question: He was present in the court to give witness.
questions.explanation: Gawahi ko 'evidence' kehte hain. 'Witness' gawahi dene wale vyakti ko kaha jata hai.

questions.question: I wish I was the President.
questions.explanation: 'Wish' wale vakyo mein sabhi subjects ke saath 'were' lagta hai.

questions.question: Bread and butter are a wholesome food.
questions.explanation: Jab do cheezein milkar ek unit banayein, toh singular verb 'is' lagti hai.

questions.question: He (a)/ is one of (b)/ the tallest boy (c)/ in the class. (d)
questions.explanation: 'One of' ke baad hamesha plural noun 'boys' ka prayog hona chahiye.

questions.question: He dare not to go there alone.
questions.explanation: 'Dare not' ke baad bare infinitive (V1 bina 'to' ke) ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: If I (a)/ was you (b)/ I would (c)/ not forgive him. (d)
questions.explanation: Kalpana (Imaginary sentence) mein 'I' ke saath 'were' ka prayog hota hai, 'was' ka nahi.

questions.question: I (a)/ use to (b)/ play Hockey (c)/ when I was young. (d)
questions.explanation: Past habit ke liye 'used to' ka prayog hota hai, 'use to' galat form hai.

questions.question: You (a)/ need (b)/ not (c)/ to worry. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Need not' modal hai, iske baad 'to' ka prayog galat hai. Seedhe 'worry' (V1) aayega.

questions.question: Failure must not have permanent affect on a person.
questions.explanation: 'Permanent' adjective ke baad noun 'effect' ki zarurat hai. 'Affect' ek verb hai.

questions.question: Mathematics (a)/ are (b)/ not (c)/ so easy. (d)
questions.explanation: Mathematics ek singular vishay hai, isliye plural verb 'are' galat hai.

questions.question: Failure (a)/ must not (b)/ have permanent (c)/ affect on a person. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Permanent' adjective ke baad noun 'effect' aana chahiye. 'Affect' ek verb hai.

questions.question: The jury (a)/ was (b)/ divided (c)/ in their opinion. (d)
questions.explanation: Jab Collective Noun (Jury) ke sadasyon mein matbhed ho, toh plural verb 'were' aur plural pronoun 'their' lagta hai.

questions.question: My (a)/ friend (b)/ and brother (c)/ are here. (d)
questions.explanation: 'My' sirf pehle noun ke saath hai, iska matlab dost aur bhai ek hi vyakti hai, isliye 'is' aayega.

questions.question: You should (a)/ have used (b)/ the money for (c)/ paying your debts. (d)
questions.explanation: Past advice ke liye 'should have + V3' ka upyog sahi hai. Isme koi error nahi hai.

questions.question: The Prime Minister (a)/ with (b)/ his cabinet colleagues (c)/ were present. (d)
questions.explanation: 'With', 'along with', 'as well as' se jude nouns mein verb pehle subject (Prime Minister) ke anusar 'was' hogi.

questions.question: Politics are a dirty game.
questions.explanation: Politics singular subject hai, isliye 'is' aayega.

questions.question: It is (a)/ time (b)/ we (c)/ go home. (d)
questions.explanation: 'It is time' के बाद वाले Clause में Verb की Second Form (went) का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: She (a)/ has (b)/ been (c)/ knowing me for years. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Know' एक Stative Verb है, इसका Continuous (knowing) नहीं बनता। 'Has known' सही होगा।

questions.question: I (a)/ wish (b)/ he (c)/ was here. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Wish' (kalpana) wale vakyo mein sabhi subjects ke saath 'were' lagta hai.

questions.question: Either (a)/ Mohan (b)/ or (c)/ his friends has come. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Either...or' mein verb nearest subject 'friends' (plural) ke anusar 'have' hogi.

questions.question: He would rather to beg than steal.
questions.explanation: 'Would rather' ke baad bare infinitive (V1 bina 'to' ke) aata hai.

questions.question: We would (a)/ only (b)/ wonder about (c)/ in aimless pursuits. (d)
questions.explanation: Bina uddeshya ghumne ke liye 'wander' (W-A-N-D-E-R) ka prayog hota hai, 'wonder' ka nahi.

questions.question: I (a)/ saw (b)/ him (c)/ to cross the road. (d)
questions.explanation: Verbs of perception (see, hear, watch) ke baad object + V1 aata hai, 'to' nahi.

questions.question: Economics are an interesting subject.
questions.explanation: Economics singular subject hai, isliye 'is' aayega.

questions.question: You are always doing this mistake.
questions.explanation: Galti karne ke liye 'make a mistake' ka prayog hota hai, 'do a mistake' galat collocation hai.

questions.question: He was made do the work.
questions.explanation: 'Make' jab passive (was made) mein ho, toh 'to + V1' lagta hai.

questions.question: I (a)/ would (b)/ rather (c)/ to stay at home. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Would rather' ke baad hamesha V1 (stay) aata hai, 'to stay' galat hai.

questions.question: It is (a)/ I (b)/ who (c)/ has done this. (d)
questions.explanation: Relative pronoun 'who' ke baad verb uske antecedent 'I' ke anusar 'have' honi chahiye.

questions.question: Not only the doctor but also the nurses was helpful.
questions.explanation: 'Not only...but also' mein verb nearest subject (nurses) ke anusar plural 'were' hogi.

questions.question: He lay (a)/ his luggage (b)/ aside and (c)/ lay down to rest. (d)
questions.explanation: Luggage rakhne ke liye 'lay' ki past form 'laid' ka prayog hona chahiye.

questions.question: Neither of the two candidates were selected.
questions.explanation: 'Neither of' ke saath hamesha singular verb 'was' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: He told me that he is ill.
questions.explanation: Past reporting verb ke saath 'is' ka 'was' ho jayega.

questions.question: I had better left the place.
questions.explanation: 'Had better' ke baad V1 'leave' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: I (a)/ have (b)/ many (c)/ works to do. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Work' (kaam) uncountable hai. Iska plural 'works' nahi hota. 'Much work' ya 'many pieces of work' kahein.

questions.question: Politics (a)/ are (b)/ a (c)/ dirty game. (d)
questions.explanation: Politics singular noun hai jab ye ek vishay ya gatividhi ho, isliye 'is' ka prayog hoga.

questions.question: Some (a)/ of the (b)/ questions (c)/ was difficult. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Some of' ke baad plural countable noun ho toh plural verb 'were' aati hai.

questions.question: He (a)/ was (b)/ made (c)/ do the work. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Make' jab passive voice mein ho (was made), toh iske saath 'to + V1' (to do) lagta hai.

questions.question: If I (a)/ had (b)/ money (c)/ I will help you. (d)
questions.explanation: Second conditional mein 'If + V2' ke saath 'would + V1' ka prayog hota hai, isliye 'would' aayega.

questions.question: None (a)/ of (b)/ the work (c)/ have been finished. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Work' uncountable noun hai, isliye iske saath singular verb 'has' aayegi.

questions.question: Ten thousand rupees are a large amount.
questions.explanation: Nishchit rashi ko ek unit maankar singular verb 'is' lagai jati hai.

questions.question: I (a)/ am (b)/ used to (c)/ drive in heavy traffic. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Be (am) + used to' ke baad V1+ing (driving) ka prayog habit dikhane ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: He (a)/ dare not (b)/ to go (c)/ there alone. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Dare not' ke baad bare infinitive (V1 bina 'to' ke) 'go' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: The Government cannot be able to contain the disease.
questions.explanation: 'Can' aur 'able to' ek hi cheez hain. Dono ka saath use superfluous hai. 'Will not be able to' sahi hai.

questions.question: He does nothing but to find faults in others.
questions.explanation: 'Does nothing but' ke baad Bare Infinitive (V1 bina 'to' ke) ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: The (a)/ cattle (b)/ is (c)/ grazing in the field. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Cattle' dikhne mein singular hai par hota plural hai, isliye 'are' ka prayog hoga.

questions.question: He returned (a)/ the purse (b)/ though he could (c)/ keep it easily. (d)
questions.explanation: Past ki capability jo poori nahi hui, uske liye 'could have + V3' (could have kept) ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: Many (a)/ a (b)/ man (c)/ have died of hunger. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Many a' ke baad singular noun aur singular verb 'has' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: Many (a)/ a flower (b)/ are (c)/ born to blush unseen. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Many a' ke baad singular verb 'is' ka prayog hota hai, 'are' galat hai.

questions.question: He works hard (a)/ so that (b)/ he should please (c)/ his Manager. (d)
questions.explanation: 'So that' (uddeshya) ke saath 'may' ka prayog hota hai jab main clause present tense mein ho. 'Should' galat hai.

questions.question: The value of the dollar declines as the inflation raises.
questions.explanation: Inflation khud badhti hai (intransitive), isliye 'rises' ka prayog hoga, 'raises' (badhana) ka nahi.

questions.question: He made me to cry.
questions.explanation: 'Make' (active) ke baad bare infinitive 'cry' aata hai.

questions.question: Neither (a)/ of the (b)/ films (c)/ were worth watching. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Neither of' ke saath hamesha singular verb 'was' ka prayog kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Let (a)/ him (b)/ to (c)/ do the work. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Let' ke baad hamesha Bare Infinitive (bina 'to' ke verb) 'do' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: He (a)/ was (b)/ so (c)/ exhausted. (d)
questions.explanation: Exhausted (thaka hua) ke saath 'so' ya 'very' ka prayog upyukt hai.

questions.question: Each of the boys have their books.
questions.explanation: 'Each' ke saath verb 'has' aur pronoun 'his' singular honge.

questions.question: The (a)/ news (b)/ are (c)/ very shocking. (d)
questions.explanation: 'News' दिखने में बहुवचन है पर अर्थ में एकवचन, इसलिए 'is' का प्रयोग होगा।

questions.question: The Arabian Nights are an interesting book.
questions.explanation: Kitab ka naam singular hota hai, isliye 'is' aayega.

questions.question: The Government (a)/ cannot (b)/ be able to (c)/ contain the disease. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Can' aur 'able to' dono ka arth ek hai, isliye dono ko saath use karna superfluous (galat) hai.

questions.question: She (a)/ told me (b)/ that (c)/ she can dance well. (d)
questions.explanation: Reporting verb 'told' (Past) mein hai, isliye sub-ordinate clause mein 'can' ka 'could' hoga.

questions.question: The (a)/ Arabian Nights (b)/ are (c)/ an interesting book. (d)
questions.explanation: Kitab ka naam singular hota hai, isliye singular verb 'is' ka prayog hoga.

questions.question: Slow and steady win the race.
questions.explanation: Ye ek unit ko darshata hai, isliye singular verb 'wins' aayega.

questions.question: A lot (a)/ of (b)/ water (c)/ have flown. (d)
questions.explanation: Uncountable noun 'water' ke saath hamesha singular verb 'has' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: Many a student have failed.
questions.explanation: 'Many a' ke baad hamesha singular noun aur singular verb 'has' aata hai.

questions.question: He (a)/ prefers (b)/ tea (c)/ than coffee. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Prefer' aur 'Preferable' ke saath hamesha preposition 'to' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: Gulliver's Travels (a)/ were (b)/ written (c)/ by Jonathan Swift. (d)
questions.explanation: Kisi kitab ya film ka naam plural dikhne par bhi singular hota hai, isliye 'was' aayega.

questions.question: If you turn the corner, you will found a house.
questions.explanation: Modal 'will' ke baad hamesha verb ki first form (V1) 'find' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: It (a)/ is (b)/ time (c)/ we start working. (d)
questions.explanation: 'It is time' ke baad wale clause mein verb ki second form (started) ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: The ship drowned in the middle of the ocean.
questions.explanation: Nirjeev vastu (ship) ke doobne ke liye 'sank' aata hai. 'Drowned' sajeev ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: The wood (a)/ was (b)/ floating (c)/ on the water. (d)
questions.explanation: Satah par tairne ke liye 'float' sahi hai. Doobne ke liye 'sink' aur insaan ke liye 'swim' aata hai.

questions.question: The (a)/ quality of (b)/ these apples (c)/ are good. (d)
questions.explanation: Sentence ka asli subject 'Quality' (singular) hai, isliye verb 'is' aayegi.

questions.question: My (a)/ friend (b)/ and philosopher (c)/ have come. (d)
questions.explanation: 'My' sirf pehle noun ke saath hai, iska matlab ek hi vyakti dost aur darshanik hai, isliye 'has' aayega.

questions.question: Neither (a)/ of (b)/ the (c)/ answers are correct. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Neither of' ke saath hamesha singular verb 'is' ka prayog kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Five years are a long time.
questions.explanation: Duration ko unit maan kar singular verb 'is' lagate hain.

questions.question: I (a)/ have been (b)/ knowing him (c)/ for ten years. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Know' ek static verb hai, iska continuous (knowing) form nahi hota. 'I have known' sahi hoga.

questions.question: The river has overflown its banks.
questions.explanation: Nadi behne ke liye 'overflowed' V3 sahi form hai.

questions.question: I (a)/ am (b)/ used to (c)/ get up early in the morning. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Be (am) + used to' ke baad V1+ing (getting up) ka prayog hota hai aadat batane ke liye.

questions.question: Every (a)/ man and woman (b)/ in the village (c)/ were terrified. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Every' ke saath hamesha singular verb (was) ka prayog kiya jata hai.

questions.question: These (a)/ poisonous (b)/ gases will (c)/ effect health. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Effect' ek noun hai. Yahan verb ki zarurat hai, isliye 'affect' sahi choice hai.

questions.question: A (a)/ pair of (b)/ shoes (c)/ were bought by me. (d)
questions.explanation: Jab 'A pair of' ka prayog ho, toh verb singular (was) hoti hai.

questions.question: None (a)/ of (b)/ these (c)/ money is mine. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Money' uncountable hai aur 'none' ke saath singular verb 'is' ka prayog yahan sahi hai.

questions.question: Economics (a)/ are (b)/ an (c)/ interesting subject. (d)
questions.explanation: Vishayo (subjects) ke naam singular hote hain, isliye 'is' aayega.

questions.question: Being a rainy day, Vijay decided to stay at home.
questions.explanation: Vijay 'rainy day' nahi ho sakta, isliye impersonal subject 'It' ka prayog 'It being' ke roop mein hoga.

questions.question: Being (a)/ a rainy day, (b)/ Vijay decided (c)/ to stay at home. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Being' ke liye impersonal subject 'It' ki zarurat hai (It being a rainy day), kyunki Vijay 'rainy day' nahi hai.

questions.question: Remembering (a)/ not to loose (b)/ your temper (c)/ even when provoked. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Loose' means 'ढीला'. Gussa khone ke liye 'lose' (L-O-S-E) ka prayog hota hai. Don't confuse loose with lose.

questions.question: The traders (a)/ suddenly (b)/ rise the prices (c)/ of crude oil last year. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Last year' past ki baat hai, isliye 'raised' (badhana) ka prayog hoga. 'Rise' ka arth swayam uthna hota hai.

questions.question: It is time we go home.
questions.explanation: 'It is time' ke baad clause mein V2 'went' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: Half (a)/ of (b)/ the (c)/ mango were rotten. (d)
questions.explanation: Agar 'Half of' ke baad singular noun hai toh verb bhi singular 'was' hogi.

questions.question: A number of (a)/ students (b)/ was (c)/ absent today. (d)
questions.explanation: 'A number of' ke saath plural verb (were) lagti hai, jabki 'The number of' ke saath singular.

questions.question: Two (a)/ and two (b)/ makes (c)/ four. (d)
questions.explanation: Ganitiya tathyon (maths facts) mein singular verb 'makes' ka prayog sahi mana jata hai.

questions.question: The news (a)/ are (b)/ very (c)/ shocking. (d)
questions.explanation: 'News' hamesha singular noun ki tarah treat kiya jata hai, isliye 'is' aayega.

questions.question: Physics (a)/ are (b)/ his (c)/ favorite subject. (d)
questions.explanation: Subjects ke naam (Physics, Mathematics) singular hote hain, isliye plural verb 'are' galat hai.

questions.question: The news (a)/ from the (b)/ war zone (c)/ are very discouraging. (d)
questions.explanation: 'News' hamesha singular noun mana jata hai, isliye iske saath plural verb 'are' ke badle 'is' aayega.

questions.question: I (a)/ used to (b)/ playing (c)/ cricket in my childhood. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Used to' (modal) ke baad V1 'play' ka prayog hota hai, 'playing' ka nahi.

questions.question: You (a)/ had (b)/ better (c)/ to consult a doctor. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Had better' ke baad hamesha bare infinitive (consult) aata hai, 'to' ka prayog galat hai.

questions.question: I will send (a)/ my servant (b)/ but I cannot (c)/ insure that he reaches. (d)
questions.explanation: Nishchit karne ke liye 'ensure' ka prayog hota hai. 'Insure' bima (insurance) se sambandhit hai.

questions.question: He (a)/ would rather (b)/ to play (c)/ than study. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Would rather' के बाद Bare Infinitive (V1 बिना 'to' के) आता है, इसलिए 'play' होगा।

questions.question: I (a)/ was laying (b)/ down when (c)/ the bell rang. (d)
questions.explanation: Letne (lie) ki continuous form 'lying' hoti hai. 'Laying' ka arth kuch rakhna hota hai.

questions.question: My scissors is very sharp.
questions.explanation: 'Scissors' plural noun hai aur 'are' leta hai.

questions.question: Politics (a)/ are (b)/ a (c)/ dirty game. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Politics' ko jab ek vishay ke roop mein dekha jata hai, toh singular verb 'is' lagti hai.

questions.question: United States have a big navy.
questions.explanation: Desh ka naam singular hota hai, isliye 'has' aayega.

questions.question: The wood (a)/ was (b)/ floating (c)/ in the river. (d)
questions.explanation: Paani ki satah par tairne ke liye 'floating' sahi verb hai. Isme koi error nahi hai.

questions.question: Every man and woman have the right.
questions.explanation: 'Every' se jude huye nouns ke saath hamesha singular verb 'has' aati hai.

questions.question: The (a)/ majority (b)/ of students (c)/ is against the proposal. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Majority of' ke baad agar plural noun ho toh verb plural 'are' aati hai.

questions.question: One of (a)/ the (b)/ biggest problems (c)/ are unemployment. (d)
questions.explanation: 'One of' ka arth hai 'bahut mein se ek', isliye verb hamesha singular 'is' aani chahiye.

questions.question: Walking in the field late at night, a snake bit me.
questions.explanation: Dangling participle error. 'Walking' ka subject 'snake' nahi ho sakta, isliye subject 'I' dena hoga.

questions.question: He avoids to talk to me.
questions.explanation: 'Avoid' ke baad Gerund (V1+ing) 'talking' aata hai.

questions.question: The news are very discouraging.
questions.explanation: 'News' hamesha singular noun hota hai, isliye iske saath 'is' aayega.

questions.question: He prefers tea than coffee.
questions.explanation: 'Prefer' ke saath hamesha 'to' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: India's largest (a)/ corporate house may (b)/ be force (c)/ to review the parameters. (d)
questions.explanation: Passive voice 'be' ke baad hamesha V3 'forced' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: Bhagat Singh lie down his life for his motherland.
questions.explanation: Balidaan dene ke liye 'lay down' ki past form 'laid down' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: I (a)/ wish (b)/ I (c)/ was the President. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Wish' wale vakyo mein sabhi subjects ke saath 'were' lagta hai, 'was' galat hai.

questions.question: India's largest corporate house may be force to review the parameters.
questions.explanation: Passive voice mein 'be' ke baad hamesha V3 'forced' ka prayog kiya jata hai.

questions.question: She (a)/ dare (b)/ not (c)/ to go there. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Dare not' ke saath bina 'to' ke verb lagti hai. 'Dare not go' sahi hai.

questions.question: Work hard (a)/ lest you (b)/ might (c)/ fail. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Lest' ke saath hamesha 'should' ka pair banta hai, 'might' ka nahi.

questions.question: One of (a)/ my friends (b)/ are (c)/ a doctor. (d)
questions.explanation: 'One of' ke baad plural noun lekin verb hamesha singular (is) aati hai.

questions.question: He (a)/ was (b)/ very (c)/ exhausted. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Exhausted' ek adjective ki tarah kaam karta hai jiske saath 'very' ka prayog sahi hai.

questions.question: Work hard lest you might fail.
questions.explanation: 'Lest' ke saath hamesha 'should' ka joda banta hai.

questions.question: I (a)/ cannot (b)/ be able to (c)/ help you. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Can' और 'Able to' दोनों का अर्थ एक ही है, दोनों का एक साथ प्रयोग 'Superfluous' (अनावश्यक) है।

questions.question: One (a)/ of (b)/ my friends (c)/ have a car. (d)
questions.explanation: 'One of' के बाद Noun बहुवचन होता है पर Verb हमेशा Singular (has) आती है।

questions.question: I would rather to die.
questions.explanation: 'Would rather' ke baad V1 'die' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: Either of (a)/ the three (b)/ sisters (c)/ is beautiful. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Either' ka prayog sirf do ke liye hota hai. Teen (three) ke liye 'Any of' ya 'One of' ka prayog karein.

questions.question: Time (a)/ and (b)/ tide (c)/ wait for none. (d)
questions.explanation: Ye ek kahavat hai jisme 'wait' (plural) ka prayog paramparagat roop se sahi mana jata hai.

questions.question: It is time we start working.
questions.explanation: 'It is time' ke baad wale clause mein V2 'started' ka prayog hota hai.

questions.question: Either (a)/ you (b)/ or he (c)/ are responsible. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Either...or' mein verb hamesha pass wale subject (he) ke anusar singular (is) honi chahiye.

questions.question: He (a)/ and not (b)/ his parents (c)/ are responsible. (d)
questions.explanation: 'And not' se jude nouns mein verb pehle subject 'He' ke anusar singular 'is' hogi.

questions.question: I (a)/ would (b)/ like (c)/ stay here. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Would like' ke baad 'to + V1' (to stay) ka prayog hota hai, ye bare infinitive nahi leta.

questions.question: A pair (a)/ of (b)/ trousers (c)/ were bought by me. (d)
questions.explanation: Jab 'A pair of' ka prayog ho, toh verb singular 'was' honi chahiye.

questions.question: The color T.V. (a)/ costed me (b)/ ten thousand (c)/ last year. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Cost' ki teeno forms 'cost' hi rehti hain. 'Costed' ka prayog galat hai, bhale hi baat past (last year) ki ho.

questions.question: The President overtakes in case of emergency.
questions.explanation: Niyantran lene ke liye 'takes over' ka prayog hota hai. 'Overtake' matlab aage nikal jana.

questions.question: He (a)/ told me (b)/ that (c)/ he can help me. (d)
questions.explanation: Reporting verb 'told' (past) mein hai, isliye 'can' ka 'could' ho jayega.

questions.question: One of the biggest problems are unemployment.
questions.explanation: 'One of' ke baad plural noun lekin verb hamesha singular 'is' aati hai.

questions.question: The value (a)/ of the dollar (b)/ declines as (c)/ the inflation raises. (d)
questions.explanation: Inflation khud badhti hai, isliye intransitive verb 'rises' ka prayog hoga, 'raises' (badhana) ka nahi.

questions.question: I (a)/ need (b)/ not (c)/ to go there. (d)
questions.explanation: 'Need not' ek modal hai, aur modal ke baad seedhe V1 (go) aata hai, 'to go' nahi.

questions.question: I look forward to meet you.
questions.explanation: 'Look forward to' ke baad hamesha Gerund 'meeting' lagta hai.

questions.question: Bread (a)/ and (b)/ butter (c)/ are my favorite breakfast. (d)
questions.explanation: Jab do cheezein milkar ek unit (nashta) banayein, toh singular verb 'is' lagta hai.

questions.question: She dare not to go there.
questions.explanation: Modal 'dare not' के बाद 'to' नहीं आता, सीधे V1 'go' आता है।
